finding: The Pan Borneo 1h forecasting panel and leakage-free windows are feasible for short/medium horizon forecasting.
supporting_metric: 51 monitoring points; high 1h coverage; leakage-free chronological windows
paper_interpretation: The dataset supports a reproducible corridor-scale forecasting experiment.
caution_or_limitation: The 168h prediction horizon remains a stress test, not the main task.

supporting_metric: SeasonalHistoricalAverage test MAE is substantially lower than Persistence and HistoricalAverage overall.
paper_interpretation: Periodic point-hour-day structure is strong and must be treated as a serious comparator.
caution_or_limitation: Do not compare deep models only against weak baselines.

finding: Controlled deep models improve short/medium horizons but do not dominate all horizons.
supporting_metric: TCN/LSTM improve over seasonal baseline at 1h, 3h and 6h; 12h and 24h are worse.
paper_interpretation: Deep models add dynamic correction for short/medium horizons.
caution_or_limitation: Do not claim universal deep learning dominance.

finding: TCN speed-only is the strongest direct forecasting feature configuration.
supporting_metric: speed_only mean MAE 0.8951 across 1h/3h/6h, best among ablation groups.
paper_interpretation: Recent speed history is the dominant predictive signal.
caution_or_limitation: Reliability features did not consistently improve direct accuracy.

finding: Reliability indicators are useful for diagnosis and robustness interpretation.
supporting_metric: Ablation does not improve direct accuracy; robustness strata expose volatility and coverage-related error patterns.
paper_interpretation: Reliability-aware analysis is valuable as diagnostic evidence under sparse FCD conditions.
caution_or_limitation: Frame reliability-aware contribution as diagnosis/robustness, not guaranteed accuracy improvement.

paper_interpretation: Memory length should be tuned by horizon rather than fixed as longest available context.
caution_or_limitation: Do not claim longer history is always better.

finding: High volatility is the main difficult-sample source.
supporting_metric: High-volatility bins have much higher MAE than low-volatility bins across horizons.
paper_interpretation: Traffic state instability, rather than only missingness, drives hard cases.
caution_or_limitation: Volatility is diagnostic and should not be computed from the target window.

finding: The core TCN advantage is stable across random seeds.
supporting_metric: 5 seeds evaluated; all seeds outperform SeasonalHistoricalAverage for all core horizons is True.
paper_interpretation: The main predictive claim is not an artifact of a single random initialization.
caution_or_limitation: Seed stability is evidence for robustness, not exhaustive uncertainty quantification.

finding: The public benchmark check supports pipeline portability only.
supporting_metric: METR-LA-mini five-seed sanity check completed; TCN outperforms HistoricalAverage but not Persistence.
paper_interpretation: Supports pipeline portability, not public benchmark superiority.
caution_or_limitation: Do not claim SOTA performance or public benchmark dominance.
